2025-12-20-deployment-gates-github-actio.notes: All action versions current (actions/checkout@v4). YAML syntax correct. Environment and deployment gate configurations are accurate.

2025-12-20-dynamic-matrix-github-actions.notes: All action versions current (actions/checkout@v4, actions/setup-node@v4). fromJson usage and dynamic matrix patterns are correct.

fixes: Fixed script injection vulnerability: github.event.pull_request.title was used directly in run context. Moved to env variable PR_TITLE.
2025-12-20-github-actions-auto-merge.notes: dependabot/fetch-metadata@v2 is current. gh pr merge syntax is correct.

fixes: Updated docker/build-push-action from v5 to v6.
2025-12-20-github-actions-cache-dependen.notes: actions/cache@v4, actions/setup-node@v4, actions/setup-python@v5, actions/setup-go@v5, actions/setup-java@v4 all current.

fixes: Updated pnpm/action-setup from v2 to v4.
Updated docker/build-push-action from v5 to v6.
2025-12-20-github-actions-composite-acti.notes: Composite action structure and syntax are correct. Shell specification guidance is accurate.

fixes: Updated nick-fields/retry from v2 to v3.
2025-12-20-github-actions-debug-failures.notes: Debug logging techniques, artifact upload, tmate SSH access patterns are all correct.

fixes: Updated aws-actions/amazon-ecs-deploy-task-definition from v1 to v2.
2025-12-20-github-actions-deploy-aws.notes: OIDC authentication pattern is correct. aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v4 is current. S3, Lambda, CloudFormation deployment patterns are accurate.

2025-12-20-github-actions-deploy-kuberne.notes: All action versions current (google-github-actions/auth@v2, azure/login@v2, azure/setup-kubectl@v3, azure/setup-helm@v3). Kubernetes deployment patterns are correct.

fixes: Updated docker/build-push-action from v5 to v6 (all 12 occurrences).
2025-12-20-github-actions-docker-builds.notes: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3, docker/login-action@v3, docker/metadata-action@v5 are current. Multi-arch, caching, and SBOM patterns are correct.

2025-12-20-github-actions-environment-va.notes: Environment variable scoping, GITHUB_ENV, GITHUB_OUTPUT, GITHUB_PATH usage all correct. Dynamic variable patterns accurate.

2025-12-20-github-actions-matrix-builds.notes: All action versions current. Matrix strategy syntax, fail-fast, max-parallel, include/exclude patterns are correct.

2025-12-20-github-actions-matrix-include.notes: All action versions current (actions/setup-python@v5). Include/exclude syntax, partial matching, and dynamic matrix generation patterns are correct.

2025-12-20-github-actions-nodejs-ci.notes: All action versions current (actions/checkout@v4, actions/setup-node@v4, actions/upload-artifact@v4, actions/cache@v4, actions/github-script@v7, dorny/paths-filter@v3). CI pipeline patterns are correct.

fixes: Updated slackapi/slack-github-action from v1.25.0 to v2.
2025-12-20-github-actions-notifications.notes: Slack webhook, Teams MessageCard, Discord embed, and email notification patterns are correct. Note: v2 has breaking API changes from v1.

2025-12-20-github-actions-parallel-tests.notes: All action versions current (actions/setup-python@v5, actions/download-artifact@v4, actions/upload-artifact@v4). Test sharding patterns for Jest, Playwright, pytest are correct.

fixes: Fixed script injection vulnerability: github.event.pull_request.title was used directly in run context. Moved to env variable PR_TITLE.
2025-12-20-github-actions-pull-request-t.notes: PR trigger types, branch filtering, path filtering, pull_request_target security warning, and dorny/paths-filter@v3 are all correct.

2025-12-20-github-actions-reusable-workf.notes: workflow_call trigger syntax, inputs/outputs/secrets definitions, secrets:inherit, nesting depth (4 levels) are all correct.

2025-12-20-github-actions-secrets.notes: Secret types, GITHUB_TOKEN permissions, OIDC pattern, base64 encoding for large secrets, and security best practices are all accurate. Secret limits (48KB, 100 per repo) are correct.

2025-12-20-github-actions-service-contai.notes: Service container syntax, health checks, port mapping, job containers with service name networking, and matrix with service versions are all correct.

fixes: Updated docker/build-push-action from v5 to v6.
Updated codecov/codecov-action from v4 to v5.
2025-12-20-github-actions-workflow-templ.notes: $default-branch placeholder, properties.json format, workflow template repository structure are all correct.

fixes: Fixed invalid glob negation syntax ('!build/**/*.map') in artifacts:paths. GitLab CI does not support negation in paths; replaced with proper artifacts:exclude keyword.
Fixed deprecated Kustomize 'bases' keyword to 'resources' in overlay kustomization.yaml example.
Updated deprecated 'docker-compose' command (v1) to 'docker compose' (v2 plugin) in integration test example.

Fixed deprecated MySQL '--default-authentication-plugin=mysql_native_password' flag to '--authentication-policy=mysql_native_password'. The default_authentication_plugin option was deprecated in MySQL 8.0.27 and removed in 8.4.
Updated deprecated 'docker-compose' command (v1) to 'docker compose' (v2 plugin) throughout the post.
Updated 'apk add --no-cache docker-compose' to 'apk add --no-cache docker-cli-compose' for Alpine package name.

Fixed 'Dynamic Parallel Count' section: 'parallel: $PARALLEL_COUNT' is not valid because the parallel keyword requires a static integer and does not support CI/CD variable expansion. Replaced with a parent-child pipeline approach that generates the child pipeline YAML dynamically.
Fixed malformed code fence in release description YAML block - closing fence had '```bash' instead of '```', and trailing '```text' was changed to '```'.

Updated deprecated 'runnerRegistrationToken' Helm chart value to 'runnerToken' with runner authentication token (runner registration tokens are deprecated since GitLab 16.0, disabled by default in 17.0).
Updated deprecated '--registration-token' CLI flag to '--token' with glrt- prefixed authentication token.
Fixed invalid 'tag_list' field in config.toml example - tags are managed via GitLab UI/API or during registration, not in config.toml. Replaced with registration command example.

2025-12-22-spring-boot-transaction-manag.notes: Fixed Pitfall 4: Changed 'javax.transaction.Transactional' to 'jakarta.transaction.Transactional' to match Spring Boot 3.x/Jakarta EE namespace.

2025-12-22-unit-testing-mockito-spring-b.notes: @MockBean is deprecated since Spring Boot 3.4 in favor of @MockitoBean. Code still compiles and works but is outdated practice.

fixes: Added note about Swashbuckle.AspNetCore being removed from .NET 9 project templates in favor of Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi
Updated deprecated FluentValidation.AspNetCore package to core FluentValidation package
Replaced deprecated AddFluentValidationAutoValidation() with manual validation pattern
Corrected GetValueOrDefault version from 'C# 7.1+' to '.NET Core 2.0+ / .NET Standard 2.1+'
Added version annotations for ThrowIfNullOrEmpty (.NET 7+) and ThrowIfLessThanOrEqual (.NET 8+)
Added deprecation note for Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Polly and AddTransientHttpErrorPolicy in favor of Microsoft.Extensions.Http.Resilience
Removed invalid JSON comments from daemon.json example
Replaced non-existent BUILDKIT_CACHE_SIZE_MB env var with valid docker builder prune --keep-storage command
Replaced non-existent docker container prune --dry-run and docker image prune -a --dry-run with valid preview commands
Removed invalid JSON comments from two daemon.json examples
Replaced deprecated Traefik v3 ipwhitelist middleware with ipallowlist
Replaced deprecated nginx 'listen 443 ssl http2' with 'listen 443 ssl' plus 'http2 on' directive
Removed invalid JSON comments from two nodemon.json examples
Replaced deprecated FLASK_ENV=development with FLASK_DEBUG=1 (FLASK_ENV deprecated since Flask 2.2)
Removed invalid JSON comments from daemon.json example
Removed invalid JSON comments (# style) from IAM policy document
Removed invalid JSON comments (// style) from IAM policy document
Replaced deprecated torch.distributed.launch with torchrun in distributed training examples (Master and Worker)
